TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Children_(Robert_Miles_single_), title = Children_(Robert_Miles_single_), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Children_(Robert_Miles_single_)} }

S.FORM: Qwas Dream House Children, knalay na hayyo pzyugi sa itali lalu nya ka Robert Miles, phtgun sa kawas tay 1995 neng 11 gazi 4 nici,trang kawas qasa ga ini spyang qsliq squliq, ru spwah mrhuw sa pkalay qwas "Joe Vanelli"rasung nya Miami Amirika ubuy 'sal pzyugi, pongan na 電音大廠 Platipus Records 製作人 Simon Berry, syung nya zik 舞曲選集 "Dreamland" squ 主打單曲. Spyang qwas qani wal magan kwancyng mopuw payat binah qalang kwara cinbwanan/

Qwas Dream House Children, knalay na hayyo pzyugi sa itali lalu nya ka Robert Miles, phtgun sa kawas tay 1995 neng 11 gazi 4 nici,trang kawas qasa ga ini spyang qsliq squliq, ru spwah mrhuw sa pkalay qwas "Joe Vanelli"rasung nya Miami Amirika ubuy 'sal pzyugi, pongan na 電音大廠 Platipus Records 製作人 Simon Berry, syung nya zik 舞曲選集 "Dreamland" squ 主打單曲. Spyang qwas qani wal magan kwancyng mopuw payat binah qalang kwara cinbwanan/
S.PHON: qwas~ɕ *ream ħous~ɕe ʦ~ʨħil*ren, knalaj na ħajjo pzjuɣi s~ɕa itali lalu nja ka roβert miles~ɕ, pħtɣun s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj **** neŋ ** ɣazi * niʦ~ʨi,traŋ kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa ɣa ini s~ɕpjaŋ qs~ɕliq s~ɕquliq, ru s~ɕpwaħ mrħuw s~ɕa pkalaj qwas~ɕ "*oe *anelli"ras~ɕuŋ nja miami amirika uβuj ʔs~ɕal pzjuɣi, poŋan na **** platipus~ɕ reʦ~ʨor*s~ɕ *** s~ɕimon βerrj, s~ɕjuŋ nja zik **** "*reamlan*" s~ɕqu ****. s~ɕpjaŋ qwas~ɕ qani wal maɣan kwanʦ~ʨjŋ mopuw pajat βinaħ qalaŋ kwara ʦ~ʨinβwanan/
